Bug Report
Bug title: 
Search feature returns no results when typing keywords
What is the problem?
When a user types a keyword into the search box and clicks"search", the page shows "no results found" even when the keyword exists in the resource list

How do I make it happen?
1. open the BOSC library homepage
2. Type "Python" into the search box
3. Click the search button

What should happen instead?
The search should show at least 3 resources that contain the word "Python" in their title or description.
